name: 丹妮·索恩
introduction: Dani Thorne aka COM3T is a self-taught DJ/producer living in Los Angeles. Before Dani found her calling with music, this Miami native had guest-starred appearances on TV shows like Hannah Montana. Since then, and with a new identity, our rainbow-haired music producer has dominated major festival stages like EDC, Lights All Night, Billboard HOT 100, Nocturnal Wonderland, and Bonnaroo this summer, to name a few. Known for her hit, Hello Human with LSDream, Dani (COM3T) is set to release her first EP this year, June 2022. One of the most hands-on artists, Dani loves creating a mysterious world from a faraway place for her fans to get lost in. Whether that's through her entrancing bass tracks, intensely vibrant visuals, or even handmade set designs, she'll have you buying property on her extraterrestrial planet.
